name: /standards-remove: exits 2 when the supplied --id is not present in STANDARDS-URLS.yaml or plugin catalog
setup:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: my-source
  name: My
  url: https://my.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript]
  fetch_frequency: daily
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
